/usr/bin/ar qc libnettycore_log.a CMakeFiles/nettycore_log_obj.dir/__/__/lemo/src/log/level.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_log_obj.dir/__/__/lemo/src/log/event.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_log_obj.dir/__/__/lemo/src/log/pattern_layout.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_log_obj.dir/__/__/lemo/src/log/appender.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_log_obj.dir/__/__/lemo/src/log/console_appender.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_log_obj.dir/__/__/lemo/src/log/file_appender.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_log_obj.dir/__/__/lemo/src/log/log_paths.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_log_obj.dir/__/__/lemo/src/log/rolling_file_appender.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_log_obj.dir/__/__/lemo/src/log/async_appender.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_log_obj.dir/__/__/lemo/src/log/log_runtime.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_log_obj.dir/__/__/lemo/src/log/appender_registry.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_log_obj.dir/__/__/lemo/src/log/mdc.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_log_obj.dir/__/__/lemo/src/log/logger.cc.o CMakeFiles/nettycore_log_obj.dir/__/__/lemo/src/log/logger_repository.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnettycore_log.a
